title: BNLS Server Historical List
brief_html: A historical list of BNLS hosts that no longer exist, but are maintained here for reference and documentation purposes.
content_html:
A historical list of BNLS hosts that no longer exist, but are maintained here for reference and documentation purposes.

Hostname Owner Description
7thace.no-ip.org 7thAce Host no longer exists
alendar.no-ip.org Alendar Host no longer exists
bnls.anubisdev.net Anubis Host no longer exists as of 18 Jan 2020
bnls.mattkv.net Matt Host no longer exists as of 18 Jan 2020
bnls.net Davnit Alias to jbls.davnit.net Host no longer exists as of 04 Sep 2021
bnls.newby.live newby Host no longer exists as of 18 Jan 2020
bnls.valhallalegends.com Skywing & Yoni The first BNLS to exist. Host no longer exists
bnls.war-lords.net Davnit Alias to jbls.davnit.net
distant.no-ip.org Distant.Echo Host no longer exists
hdx.jbls.org Hdx The first JBLS. Host no longer exists
jbls.codespeak.org Vector Alias to bnls.bnetdocs.org
jbls.idiat.com idiat Host no longer exists
jbls.org Hdx The first JBLS. Host no longer exists
logon.berzerkerjbls.com Berzerker Host no longer exists
pyro.no-ip.biz Davnit Alias to jbls.davnit.net
ribose.no-ip.org Ribose Host no longer exists
wjlafrance.net joe[x86] Host no longer exists

* All hosts used standard port 9367/tcp unless otherwise stated.
